Video.summary: British sailor Edward falls in love with Manuela Cortez against her father's wishes.
Video.title: Ship of No Return

Video.summary: The unexpected arrival of men from Rose's criminal past threatens her happiness.
Video.title: Thorn of the Rose

Video.summary: A captain tries to clear a trading post owner accused of selling ammunition to the enemy.
Video.title: A Bullet for the Captain

Video.summary: Mystery shrouds a stage robbery when the alleged culprit is killed before he can be questioned.
Video.title: Stagecoach Spy

Video.summary: A homesteader runs afoul of a cattleman.
Video.title: Old Blue

Video.summary: Steve Hewitt accidentally kills the dogs of miner Tully and is haunted by his mistake.
Video.title: Dogs of the Mist

Video.summary: Entrepreneur Levi Strauss starts the world's first blue jean manufacturer.
Video.title: The Million Dollar Pants

Video.summary: On a peace mission, a rancher and a Native meet a prospector who thinks they're after his gold.
Video.title: Mission to the Mountains

Video.summary: Fighting corrupt lawmen and vigilantes.
Matt Denby faces severe bad luck: his son is bitten by a rabid animal and his wife leaves him.
Video.title: The Madstone

Video.summary: Dr. Allen Camden investigates the murder of likeable shopkeeper Grant Noble.
Video.title: Dead Man's Tale

Video.summary: A politician tries to ruin a senatorial candidate's chances by linking him with a dance hall girl.
Video.title: Quong Kee

Video.summary: A vagabond finds stolen riches and becomes a philanthropist.
Video.title: Money to Burn

Video.summary: A vengeful sea captain goes after the sailors he holds responsible for the loss of his leg.
Video.title: Cap'n Pegleg

Video.summary: Townspeople unite against a couple who refuse to carry guns and fight.
Video.title: Devil's Bar

Video.summary: Saloonkeeper Shanghai Kelly kidnaps crewmen for understaffed ships.
Video.title: Shanghai Kelly's Birthday Party

Video.summary: A recent widower wants a headstone.
Video.title: The Lone Grave

Video.summary: Scout Kit Carson competes with a trapper for the hand of a Native woman.
Video.title: Spring Rendezvous

Video.summary: A tomboy changes her ways when she meets the handsome constable of a mining town.
Video.title: The Indiana Girl

Video.summary: A man fights an oyster boat captain.
Video.title: Prince of the Oyster Pirates

Video.summary: Two prospectors pull a hoax on a banker who wants their mine.
Video.title: The Great Diamond Mines

Video.summary: A desert dwelling couple struggle with life in Death Valley.
Video.title: Dress for a Desert Girl

Video.summary: Life on the prairie is anything but easy for a newly married Swedish immigrant.
Video.title: Britta Goes Home

Video.summary: Jesse Martin stirs up a town: he claims there's a payload of gold lying right beneath Main Street.
Video.title: Gold Mine on Main Street

Video.summary: The story of how the Winchester repeating rifle helped to bring law and order to a new Idaho town.
Video.title: The Thirty-Caliber Town

Video.summary: Wagonmaster Lassen faces an unruly mob when he tries a new route to California in the 1840s.
Video.title: The Other Side of the Mountain

Image.alt: The Other Side of the Mountain
The Other Side of the Mountain
The Other Side of the Mountain
The Other Side of the Mountain
The Other Side of the Mountain
The Other Side of the Mountain
The Other Side of the Mountain
The Other Side of the Mountain
The Other Side of the Mountain

Video.summary: A Dakota wife left on her own becomes the unwilling servant of two opportunistic highwaymen.
Video.title: The Sage Hen

Video.summary: A teacher engaged to a minister tries to conceal her gambling.
Video.title: Lottie's Legacy

Video.summary: John Parker was raised by Comanches since he was a boy and wants to remain with his Native family.
Video.title: The Understanding

Video.summary: Mormons must save the life of a dying man or face the wrath of his tribe.
Video.title: A Key for the Fort

Video.summary: Lucia Darling moves to Montana to start a school but faces many challenges.
Video.title: Lucia Darling and the Ostrich

Video.summary: A convict is released from prison, but not released from his past.
Video.title: Tracy's Triumph

Video.summary: Three orphaned children continue their parents' quest for gold.
Video.title: The Tenderfoot

Video.summary: A peace-seeking Native scout aids pioneers besieged by Native renegades.
Video.title: The Visitor

Video.summary: A trouble-shooter must establish a mail route in bandit country.
Video.title: The King of Uvalde Road

Video.summary: There's more than gold in store for prim Wilhelmina Vail when she tackles a claim in Utah territory.
Video.title: Talk to Me, Charley

Video.summary: A cook skims gold nuggets off miners while working at their camp and faces the penalty of hanging.
Video.title: Early Candle Lighten

Video.summary: As a nun aids a wounded robber, she learns he is a friend of the notorious Billy the Kid.
Video.title: Lost Sheep in Trinidad

Video.summary: A land manager tries to outfox two women attempting to rightfully claim their property.
Video.title: By the Book

Video.summary: A cowboy and a Native man join forces to secure dowries for their sweethearts.
Video.title: Amos and the Black Bull

Video.summary: A sheriff in Tucson pursues bank robbers and $62,000 in cash, which has been hidden.
Video.title: Up the Chimney
